title: Mob-Crackers
body: This mod adds a 33% chance for all types of monsters to drop Mob-Crackers (Compatible with all modded monsters), right-clicking until they pop open, with a chance to drop some of the following items: - Cookies - Jokes (Right-click to reveal the punchline, and vice-versa to return to the joke) - Paper Crown (Cool wearable hats!)
